_comment: Self-improving / self-evolving agent lineage seed (Kevin 2026-06-04). These foundational works never surface on HF daily-top, so they are ingested by name into the ledger as deep-read candidates (source: lineage). The 4 Kevin-named + 2 surveys are id-verified this session; classics are high-confidence (deep-read fetches full text by id via HF/arXiv and skips gracefully if an id is stale). See memory agent-focus-direction.
